verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I was living a life Full of shame and so bad, There's no hope but then left for me, But Jesus calls me one day And drowns my sins far away, By his grace and love where I should stay.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And then I lift up my voice to praise and thanks to the Lord, Then he change the hidden side of me, I'm lucky I'm to be hold, to shining through of the world, I'm belong of the redeem I see.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: All I want is to walk with Jesus, To be with him forever, in his paradise.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: There's a beautiful land, across the sky, Where all the saints dwells and love by and by, He shall wipe our sorrows and tears away, Joy and peacefully, eternally, And that beyond the curtain of time.
